column1: Soft smile hiding ruthless intention
Icy calm expression perfectly controlled
Playful smirk like she owns the night
Deadpan face with subtle threat
Coy grin with eyebrow slightly raised
Serene face like temple silence
Cold glare with chin lifted
Laughing quietly like a private joke
Lips parted breath slow and deliberate
Bored expression like everyone is beneath her
Gentle smile with dangerous undertone
Focused expression eyes sharp and hungry
Suspicious look like she sensed betrayal
Melancholic expression haunted and beautiful
Defiant stare refusing to flinch
Sweet expression masking sharpened instincts
Smirk fading into a hard stare
Expression unreadable like a sealed letter
Wicked grin confidence turned up
Soft pout with steel in her eyes
